title: generate_html
description: Generate an HTML report from the QC metrics

input_data.description: The input JSON file containing the QC metrics

input_structure.description: The input JSON file containing the structure of the data

output_qc_report.help_text: Type: `file`, multiple: `False`, required, default: `"$id.$key.output_qc_report.html"`, direction: `output`, example: `"path/to/file.html"`.

nextflow input-output arguments.title: Nextflow input-output arguments
nextflow input-output arguments.description: Input/output parameters for Nextflow itself. Please note that both publishDir and publish_dir are supported but at least one has to be configured.
